macro.title: A town of 7,000 planned so many data centers, it’s like adding 51 Walmarts - The Washington Post
macro.summary: Developers plan to build six sprawling data center campuses in Archbald, Pennsylvania, covering about 14 percent of the town’s land. Residents are fighting back.
